title: Assignment pattern with too many elements

features.name: nested assignment pattern for 2D unpacked array parameter
features.description: Code should include a 2D unpacked array parameter initialized with nested assignment patterns where each inner pattern represents a row

features.name: positional parameter override with multi-dimensional array type
features.description: Code should include a positional parameter override where the argument is a nested assignment pattern for a 2D unpacked array type

features.name: assignment pattern with multiple 2-element row patterns
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern containing multiple 2-element array patterns used as rows in a 2D array context
